description: Alternating left-right feature rows. Each row has an image on one side and text with bullet points on the other.

fields.name: Subheading
fields.default: Three simple steps to go from idea to live website.

default.Title: Design Without Limits
default.Description: Start with a beautiful template or build from scratch. Drag, drop, and customize every detail until it's perfect.

default.Title: Collaborate in Real Time
default.Description: Work with your team simultaneously. Leave comments, track changes, and keep everyone aligned from first draft to launch.

default.Title: Launch With Confidence
default.Description: One-click publish with built-in hosting, SSL, and CDN. Your site is fast, secure, and ready for the world.
default.Bullet 1: Global CDN for blazing-fast load times
default.Bullet 2: Free SSL certificates on every site
